titleStmt.title: SII 20.49: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 49. (B.K. No. 75 of 1935-36.) KALKĒRI, HANGAL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up near the temple of Sōmēśvara.

summary.p: The record is dated Śaka 998, Rākshasa, Pushya, Amāvāsya, Sunday, Hasta nakshatra, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti. The details of this date are irregular. The Śaka year 998 corresponded to the Cyclic year Anala when the said saṁkrānti occurred on Saturday, the tithi being ba. 11 of the month Pushya and the nakshatra Viśākhā. In the cyclic year Rākshasa the saṁkrānti occurred on Friday the tithi being śu. 15 and the nakshatra Punarvasu. The intended date might be 1076 A.D., December 24, Saturday.

The inscription registers the gift of the village Pullavaḷa situated to the south of the river Varadā in Bāsavura-140, a sub-division of Banavāsi-12,000, to God Svayaṁbhū Sōmēśvara of Kalkeṟe, for worship and offerings to the deity and for feeding the ascetics, etc., by Bhuvanaikamalla-Vīra-Noḷamba who was governing Noḷṁbavāḍi, Pānuṁgallu-nāḍu and Banavāsidēśa. The gift was made, in conjunction with his wife Māḷaladēvi, at the request of Perggaḍe Divākara and was entrusted to Dēvasiṅga Jīya. The king was at that time camping at Baṅkāpura. The record contains an eulogy of the donor and his wife.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmadamarēṁdraruṁdraśikhāmaṇi gaṇataruṇakiraṇaparipriḍacaraṇaṁ sōmarkkānaḷanayanaṁ sōmēśvaradē
varīge śāśvata sukhamaṁ . © svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabhamahārājādhirājaparamēśvaraparamabhaṭṭārakaṁ sa
tyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrī madbhuvanaikamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhi pravardhdhamāna
mācandrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire baṁkāpurada nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiniraloṁdu devasada vaḍḍōlagadavasaradoḷ © kaṁda .
ca ra ṟidu śudiyaṁ taṁdu rāyadāmōdarāṁghrigaḷeṟagi savistaradiṁdaṁ binnaviseyā ydi banavāse malahari
dadaneṟiye kēḻdavadhārisi samastapradhānapracaṇḍadaṇḍanāyakamaṇḍalikamahāsāmantaṁ mallara māgama [.] dakṣiṇadigvaḷaya
manatidakṣateyiṁdeydi dakṣiṇāṁbudhivaramiti kṣōṇītaḷamaṁ nijadakṣiṇabhujabaḷadiṁ sādhisalkārā
loḍananibarumusiradippudu nijasvāmihṛtkamaḷamanaralcuvādityanesidudayādityaṁ neniṟdu . kaṁ .
vaḍedēvarindhane besanaṁ pāḻdiḻda nāniralbaḍavarssādhisuvare kapirāja sādhisuvaṁtēkāṁgadiṁdaṁ sādhisidirppu
ttanāgi cāḷukyanārāyaṇaṁ niyōga yōgaṁdharāyaṇana mogama nōrppaṁ� cakravarttiya cittavrittiyanaḻivanāṁgama
napaṁgeydar . kaṁ . tripuraṁ triṇētraniṁ daityapuraṁ kapiyiṁde khāṇḍadaṁ naraniṁ cōḷapuraṁ negaḻdudayāditya paṭutara prakaṭakōpa
va Eṁbudu siddhādēśamenaloḍaṁ damōghavākyanaṁ kuḷḷiralvēḻdu śubhalagnōdayadoḷ . svasti samastabhuvanōllasita vīrapalla
vānvayaṁ śrīpṛthvīvallabhapallavakuḷatiḷakaṁnamōghavākyaṁ kāṁcīpuravarēśvaraṁ śrīmadbhuvanaikamallavīranoḷaṁbaneṁdu noḷaṁba
va noḷaṁbavāḍiyiṁ mēle pānuṁgallunāḍu banavāsedēsamaṁ sāsanavarttiyāga dayegeyda koṭṭu dakṣiṇasamudraṁbaraṁ
sādhisikoḷḷeṁbudu mahāprasādameṁdu kaikoṇḍarasanaṁ bīḷkoṇḍu vijayōdyōgamanettikoṇḍu prasthānabhēriyaṁ poysidudu . kaṁ .
Elele jalanidhiye gōtrācaḷame disāvaḷeye vairi desegeṭṭu baral voḷakoḷḷadiroḷakoḷḷadiroḷakoḷḷadireṁdu bhēri sāṟidudāgaḷ . va .
Antu poḻaliḍaṁ biḍaloḍaṁ . vṛtta . besavēḻdaṁ bhuvanaikamallanudayādityaṁge kaikoṇṇu banda sahāyaṁ banavāseyatta poṟavīḍaṁbiṭṭu
kēḷutuṁ desegeṭṭarmmaleparkkaḷuṁ barasidar pāṇḍyaṁ bhayagoṇḍa�tta samudraṁ bugilendu tallaḷisidaṁ cōḷaṁ bhayabhrāntiyiṁ . vacana .
katipaya prayāṇaṁgaḷiṁ . vṛtta . munisiṁdaṁ si mīyalmalahara taleyaṁ dhāḷiyiṭṭeydi bēgammanegatyākṣēpadiṁdaṁ paṇida
lā pāṇḍyanaṁ khaṇḍisal cōḷana vēraṁ kirttu nīroḷgalugalasaleyalbaṁdanā baṁdanā baṁdanē tāneṁbaṁte baṁdaṁ nijavijayabha
noḷaṁbanoḷaṁ . vacana . Antu baṁdaṁ rājadhāniyenisida baḷḷigāveyaneyde vaṁduṁ . kaṁdaṁ . Idirgoṇḍu ripunripaśrī mudadiṁ
daṁ sēseyikke parape vacaśrīyidirvvaṁdu jayaśrī rāgadi narttise baṁdu pokkanudayādityaṁ . Antu pokku nijarājamaṁdi
radāsthānamaṁṭapadoḷōlagaṁgoṭṭuvīranoḷaṁbaṁ vīramēḷāpakadoḷirddu vārttāprapaṁcamaṁ taṁtamma suddhikāṟariṁ kēḻdu citta
laṭṭa . vṛtta . malaparssadbhītiyiṁ kaṇḍavayavadoḷu ṇḍarttiyiṁ vēḷegoṇḍar maleyaṁ koṟvattu bīrammana kulamani
tuṁ dāsipatrakke niṁdar . nelanuṁ sarvvasvamaṁ koṭṭaḍigeṟagidanā pāṇḍyanuḷḷaḷki bēgaṁ taleyaṁ muṁkoṭṭevinneṁdudu besanamīgeṁdaṭṭidarvāraṇaṁ
gaḷ . Antu paramaṁḍalikarella taṁtaṁmma vastuvāhanaṁgaḷaṁ koṭṭu kaṁdu biṭṭegeyyuttamire . kaṁ . noḷambadēva subhavibudhakadaṁba
kamaṁ perbbaḷoredu santōsadiṁdaṁ koṁboḷu maleyēḷumanaṁ bilaguḍisārdutiḻdanudayāditya . © © © A prithvīvallabhana
manaḻpṛye haracaraṇayugaḷapuṭapriye dānapriye māḷaladēvi yaśōpriye negaḻdaḷakhiḷavasudhātaḷadoḷ .
viḷasaśrīrūpugoṇḍirddakhiḷavasudheyaṁ tāḷditembante vākśrīlaḷitāṁgadyōtiyiṁ bhūvaḷayamanoḷakoṁḍirddaḷeṁbaṁte dhā
trītaḷamaṁ tannājñeyiṁ perccisaleseva jayaśrīyenalmikka kāṁtātiḷakaṁ śrīrūpavidyādharige samanipaḷaṁnyakāṁtākadaṁ
baṁ [.] va . A pallava mahādēviya . kaṁda . padanakhakēśāgraṁbaramodavida mānapramāṇalakṣaṇamaṁ tu
vvida caturāsyaṁgaṁ bāradu bareyal rūpu rūpavidyādhariya . Aḷikuḷaruciyaṁ nīḷōtpaḷadaḷamaṁ caṁdrabiṁbamaṁ
poṁgaḷasaṁgaḷa celvanibhagatiya nīḷkaḷigoṇḍudu rūpu rūpavidyādhariya . rūpiṁ māḷaladēviya rūpanivarppā
reṁdu peṟaruṁ kavigaḷ rūpaṁ vyāvarṇniparene rūpanadēvogaḻve rūpavidyādhariya . rūpidu vīranoḷaṁbana rūpiṁganurūpamiṁ
tidakinnārggaṁ rūpada radiṁda pratirūpenipudu rūpu rūpavidyādhariya . naḍunāḍarasada perddoḻa naḍupaḷḷiya kāma
dhēnumaṁgaṇadoḷenippade paṇta kalpataruveṁdaḍadē vaṇṇipudō rūpavidyādhariya . karajaḷadhara kaḷadhautōtkara
varṣade vaṁdi naṁdanāvaḷigaḷa vistaripuvene dānamakhiḷōrvvarege vicitrōkti rūpavidyādhariya . saśi nāyakamaṇi tārage posa
muttina sūsuvaṁ gaḍāgeṇḍesegaṁ pasarisida paṁdaroḷ narttisuvaḷ kī bale rūpavidyādhariya . vṛtta . negaḻduttuṁga śivālaya
pratatiyādityālayaṁ sāle viṣṇugṛhaṁ buddhavihāra mahābhavanaṁ nāgālayaṁ bāvi diggige śatraṁ keṟe dīpamāleye
ne nānādharmmamaṁ māḍisal jagadoḷ māḷaladēviyaṁtu peṟarārnnōṁtarmmahādānigaḷ . vacana . Antu samasta samaya
dharmmakkānirmmamenisida māḻaladēviyaruṁ ṣaḍdarśanasarasiruhanikarakkādityanenasidudayādityanuṁ taṁtamma dēvatārcca
neya tadanantaradoḷmāhēśvarana janaparipritarāgi kuḷḷirddu śivaliṁgaprabhāvapraśaṁśeya prasthāvadoḷ tatpādapadmōpajīvi .
kaṁ . Indudharaniṣṭadeyvaṁ taṁde guṇāṁbōdhi kēśavaṁ poredaḷ bhūvaṁditamāḷaladēviyareṁdaṁde divākara kritārtthaṁ jagadoḷ .
dore garuḍanaṁgarājaṁ saripāṭi kirīṭi cittajaṁ pāllisamaṁ suramaṁtriyenalke divākaranaṁ pōltapare peṁpugeṭṭiṇṇalegeḷ . vacanaṁ .
Ene negardda perggaḍe divākaraṁ lalāṭataṭasaṁpuṭitakaranāgi © kaṁda © Aṁbōnidhiparivrita viśvaṁbhareyoḷ negardirdda liṁgamaṁ pogaḻdar
svāyaṁbhu gaḍaṁ kaḍaṁ svāyaṁbhumaḷal divyaliṁgamaṁ kalkeṟeyal . Adu naiṣṭikasaṁyamiyalladargge pūjisuvu
daridiruḷgaḍugeguḍalkadu divyamūrttiyaṁ tōrppudu biḍadārādhipaṁge kuḍuvudu baramaṁ . vacanaṁ
Eṁbī binnapakkāścaryaṁ baṭṭu piriduṁ bhaktiyiṁ parijanasahitaṁ baṁdu kalkeṟeyuttaradiśābhāgada dēvatōdyānava
namadhyasthitasarōvarada paścimataṭadalpūrbbābhimukhamāgiḻdu śivālayaṁ pradakṣiṇaṁ baṁdu śrī sōmēśvaradēva
raṁ kaṇḍu © jaya suranarēṁdravaṁdita jaya sakaḷajagaikajanaka jaya jaya gaurīpṛya jaya jaya sōmēśvara jaya
jaya yōgīṁdra hṛtsarōvara haṁsā . vaca . Eṁdirbbaruṁ namaskāraṁgeydu . kṣīraṁ dadhi ghṛta sita madhudhārāḷiyalakke
gaḍugegoṭṭa soṁṭige karppūradi pūraṇemāḍi manōrāgade citravidhada pūjā vidhiyaṁ . va . Antu mahāpūjeyaṁ māḍi
manaṁ bayasi nōḍi kuḷḷirḻdu nūṟa nālvattaṟa manneyaṁ kaliyamarasanuvaṁ bēgēriya barmmagāvuṇḍanuvaṁ magaṁ
kāḷagāvuṇḍanuvaṁ karedu manneyaṁ kāviseṭṭivaṁ karedu mattaṁ . kaṁ . śaraṇāgata jaḷanidhiyaṁ parasēnege viḷaya kāḷa
jaḷanidhiyaṁ bandaredatige navanidhiya karedaṁ kelkeṟeya nābhiseṭṭiyanāgaḷ . vacana . Antu karedanibargga taṁbulamaṁ koṭṭu vīra
noḷaṁbanuṁ māḷaladēviyaruṁ sadbhaktiyiṁ © sakavarṣa 998 neya rākṣasa saṁvatsarada puṣyadamāvāsye Ādityavāra hastanakṣa
tra Uttarāyaṇa saṁkrānti vyatīpātadaṁdu . vṛtta . parahitareṁdudāttayaśareṁdu jitēṁdriyareṁdu yōgapaṁkaruhadinēśareṁdu sa
kaḷāgamakōvidareṁdu dharmmatatpararivareṁdu kūrttu malayāḷatapōnidhi dēvasiṁgijīyara padayugmamaṁ paḍedu kaccida
rartthiye puṇyamūrttigaḷ . vaca . Intenisida kāḷāmukha naiṣṭhikatapōdhanarggavalliya cchātrarggavalliya pāvuḷakkaṁ khaṇḍasphuṭi
takkaṁ dēvargge gaṁdhadhūpanivēdyakkaṁveṁdu banavāsi pannircchāsirada kaṁpaṇaṁ bāsavuraṁ nūṟanālvattaṟa ba
ḷiya baradodoṟeyiṁ teṁkaṇa pullavaḷamaṁ kalkeṟeya śrī svayaṁbhu sōmēśvaradēvargge dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi
biṭṭu koṭṭar . maṁgaḷa mahāśrī . © © kaṁ © Osedu śivaliṁgamaṁ pūjisuva śivabratige bhaktiyaṁ mā
ḷpa jagakkeseye śivālayamaṁ māḍisuvaṁge noḷaṁbavaṭṭameṁbudu baridē . va . Intī dharmamaṁ tappade pratipāḷisi
dargge vāraṇāsiyalu sāsira kavileya sāsirvva brāhmaṇarggubhayamukhigoṭṭa phaḷa makkuṁ . Ī dharmmamanāvano
rvvanaḷidaṁ kurukṣētradalu sāsira kavileyumaṁ sāsirvvarttapōdhanarumanaḷida pañcamahāpātakaṁ . Alliya dāci
gāvuṇḍaṁ jīyargge Akki biṭṭiyiṁ tiṟuva © Ī sthānadalu naiṣṭhikarallada tapōdhanariralāgadu © Ī dēgulada
vesakke kalkuṭigaṁ rēvojanoḍeyanātaṁge gaḻde matta 1 maneyondu © svadattā paradattā vā yō ha
rēti vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭhiṁ varṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmi . © kāḷagavuṇḍa sivana dāsi
Digital edition of SII 20.49 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
